what_it_does: Vitest test suite for the embedding-migration module: it exercises EMBEDDING_VERSION, migration lock acquire/release/stale handling, stale-row batch selection, end-to-end batch re-embedding, lock contention no-op behavior, and per-lens-axis vector writes.
observations: Uses temporary directories and process.env TEST_DB_PATH / TEST_CONFIG_DIR to isolate each test.
Creates both the retired vec_exchanges FLOAT[384] virtual table and the live per-lens axis table during seeding.
Tests real encoder path in runMigrationBatch with a 60-second timeout.
Simulates a stale lock by writing a non-existent PID to the lock file.
Asserts that recordReembedded writes to the current AXIS_TABLE (per-lens) rather than vec_exchanges.
pickStaleBatch test creates a minimal exchanges + tool_calls schema without embeddings tables.
fakeEmbed returns a 384-element zero array even though the live axis dimension is 2560, but it is only invoked when the lock is already held.
standouts: End-to-end migration test processes rows in two batches to prove resumability.
Stale-lock test verifies PID-based lock reclamation.
Per-lens axis assertion ties the migration output to the active embedding space.
conventions: Helper functions (openDb, seedExchanges, axisVec) scoped inside the describe block.
Uses better-sqlite3 + sqlite-vec for in-process vector storage.
Environment-variable injection for test-specific DB and config paths.
concerns: Tests rely on the real embedding encoder and network/model availability, making the 60s test potentially flaky or slow.
fakeEmbed dimension (384) does not match the live axis dimension (2560), though it is unreachable in the no-op lock test.
Schema setup is repeated inline across multiple tests instead of a shared helper.
Process.env mutation between tests could leak if afterEach cleanup throws.
notes: This is the integration test for migrating exchange embeddings from the retired 384-dim float table to the current per-lens INT8 axis, including concurrency lock semantics.
questions: Does runMigrationBatch require an initialized embeddings model, or should it accept an injected embedder in all production paths?
How does the test suite behave when the live axis changes dimension or table name?
Is the lock file path contract between tests and implementation stable?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose—testing embedding migration, lock handling, and per-lens axis writes—matches what the file actually tests.
intention_signals: The file is trying to give confidence that the embedding migration is safe to run concurrently, resumes after partial runs, writes vectors into the correct live per-lens table, and reclaims locks from dead processes.
novelty: It explicitly tests the transition between a retired vec_exchanges[384] table and a live per-lens INT8 axis table, including real-encoder end-to-end verification.
contribution: Provides behavioral coverage for migration lock semantics, stale-row batching, resumable re-embedding, and per-lens axis persistence that a fused system would retain as the test specification for the migration.
summary_for_embedding: A Vitest integration test file for an embedding migration that moves exchange embeddings from a retired 384-dim float table to the live per-lens INT8 axis, covering locks, batching, resumability, and real-encoder re-embedding.
intention_for_embedding: To verify that the embedding migration correctly identifies stale rows, serializes across processes via a PID lock, resumes partial batches, and writes updated vectors into the current per-lens axis table.

symbols.does: Builds a nonzero INT8 vector at the active axis dimension for test assertions.
symbols.description: Returns a number array of length AXIS_DIM filled with the given value, used to supply a valid non-zero cosine vector when testing recordReembedded writes to the live per-lens axis table.

symbols.does: Opens a fresh better-sqlite3 database and loads the sqlite-vec extension.
symbols.description: Creates a new Database instance at dbPath and calls sqliteVec.load so each test can use virtual vector tables; returned db is closed by the caller.

symbols.does: Creates schema and inserts sample exchange rows plus retired vec_exchanges vectors.
symbols.description: Sets up the exchanges table, the retired vec_exchanges FLOAT[384] virtual table, and the live per-lens axis index, then inserts n exchanges with the specified embedding_version and random 384-dim float vectors for migration tests.

symbols.does: Returns a zero-filled 384-element array as a stub embedder.
symbols.description: Defined inside the lock-contention test as an async function that would produce a zero vector; it is never actually called because runMigrationBatch exits early when the lock is already held.
